item.title: Version 2026.03.19
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.19

  • Upgraded transcription model to Whisper large-v3-turbo — replaces `medium` (769M params) with `openai_whisper-large-v3_turbo_954MB` (809M params, QLoRA compressed). The turbo architecture keeps the full large-v3 encoder but slashes the decoder from 24 layers to 4, enabling future streaming support. Eval results across 12 languages: average WER dropped from 7% to 4% (−43%). Biggest wins: Portuguese 6.5% → 0%, Hindi 39% → 19%, Arabic 12% → 6.5%. Runs at the same speed as medium on ANE (5.5s vs 5.1s avg). Download size is smaller (954 MB vs ~1.5 GB).
  • EvalRunner: `--ane` flag — forces Neural Engine for encoder compute, overriding the default CPU+GPU fallback for large-prefix models. Used to validate that turbo runs correctly on ANE.

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
